citation_and_locator: Chor, Winnie. 2010. Inclusion of the outsider—grammaticalization of the verbal particle maai in Cantonese. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics 8(2):33-62; sections 2-4, examples 1-21
what_it_supports: Direct historical and contemporary evidence for motion, directional, together, additive object/event scope, contextual and conventionalized completion, and negative evaluation; corpus/source methodology and grammaticalization path.
limit: Diachronic sources vary in period and genre; the proposed pathway and subjectification analysis do not supply a deterministic modern parser rule or exhaustive lexical inventory.

citation_and_locator: Wong, Anita Mei-Yin. 2023. Understanding Development and Disorder in Cantonese Using Language Sample Analysis. Routledge; pp. 49, 54, 102, 128
what_it_supports: Describes `埋` as “also/along” expanding a domain toward completion; gives `食埋啲餅`, topicalized `啲餅你食埋`, `食埋啲皮`, and `等埋我`.
limit: Clinical/developmental coding framework and selected examples do not establish every adult scope, lexical, directional, or evaluative profile.
